{"type": "text", "file": {"filePath": "d:\21. harness\agent-harness-ygkim\.agents-dev\scripts\ask_gemini.py", "content": """"Gemini researcher agent ��� workspace.md�쓽 Task瑜� �씫怨� gemini CLI瑜� �샇異쒗빀�땲�떎."""
import sys
import subprocess
import time
from pathlib import Path

BASE_DIR = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent
WORKSPACE = BASE_DIR / "workspace" / "workspace.md"
ROLE_FILE = Path(__file__).parent.parent / "roles" / "researcher.md"


def build_prompt(task: str) -> str:
    workspace = WORKSPACE.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    role = ROLE_FILE.read_text(encoding="utf-8") if ROLE_FILE.exists() else ""
    return f"""<role>
{role}
</role>

<workspace>
{workspace}
</workspace>

<task>
{task}
</task>

�쐞 workspace.md瑜� �씫怨� �븷�떦�맂 Task瑜� �닔�뻾�븯�꽭�슂.
�셿猷� �썑 role�뿉 紐낆떆�맂 ���濡� workspace.md瑜� �뾽�뜲�씠�듃�븯�꽭�슂.
"""


def run(task: str):
    prompt = build_prompt(task)
    print(f"[Gemini] Task: {task[:80]}", flush=True)

    log_dir = Path(__file__).parent.parent / "log"
    log_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
    log_file = log_dir / f"gemini-{time.strftime('%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')}.log"

    import tempfile, os
    try:
        # �봽濡ы봽�듃瑜� UTF-8 �엫�떆 �뙆�씪濡� ����옣 �썑 stdin�쑝濡� �쟾�떖 (cp949 �씤肄붾뵫 臾몄젣 �슦�쉶)
        with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", suffix=".txt", delete=False, encoding="utf-8") as f:
            f.write(prompt)
            temp_path = f.name
        try:
            with open(temp_path, "rb") as stdin_file:
                result = subprocess.run(
                    ["gemini", "-p", " "],  # -p " ": headless 紐⑤뱶 �듃由ш굅, �떎�젣 �궡�슜��� stdin
                    stdin=stdin_file,
                    capture_output=True, timeout=300,
                    cwd=str(BASE_DIR),
                    shell=True,  # Windows�뿉�꽌 .cmd �뙆�씪 �떎�뻾�뿉 �븘�슂
                )
        finally:
            os.unlink(temp_path)
        output = result.stdout.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
        if result.returncode != 0:
            output += f"\n[stderr]\n{result.stderr.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')}"
        log_file.write_text(output, encoding="utf-8")
        print(output[-2000:] if len(output) > 2000 else output, flush=True)
        print(f"[濡쒓렇] {log_file}", flush=True)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        print("[�삤瑜�] 'gemini' 紐낅졊�뼱瑜� 李얠쓣 �닔 �뾾�뒿�땲�떎. gemini CLI媛� �꽕移섎릺�뼱 �엳�뒗吏� �솗�씤�븯�꽭�슂.")
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        print("[����엫�븘�썐] gemini �떎�뻾�씠 300珥덈�� 珥덇낵�뻽�뒿�땲�떎.")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    task = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "workspace.md �솗�씤 �썑 ���湲� 以묒씤 Task �닔�뻾"
    run(task)
", "numLines": 72, "startLine": 1, "totalLines": 72}}
